effects.tier1: 18 damage; prone and can't stand (save ends)
effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: A giant unearths a structure, hazard, or chunk of the encounter map and launches it to fill the area. Each target makes an **Agility test**.

Each giant in the encounter takes a deep breath and yells, pushing each creature within 3 squares of them up to 10 squares. A creature who can be pushed by more than one giant is pushed by one giant of your choice.

effects.tier1: 10 damage; the target falls into the fissure, and is prone and can't stand (EoT)
effects.tier2: 10 damage; the target is prone and hanging onto the edge of the fissure
effects.tier3: The target can shift into the nearest unoccupied space outside the fissure.
effects.effect: A giant creates a fissure along the ground, either in a 15 x 2 line within 1 or a 10 x 3 line within 2, and that opens up to a depth of 6 squares. Each giant in the area can shift into the nearest unoccupied space outside the fissure. Each non-giant in the area makes an **Agility test**.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: If a target was already slowed, that condition continues but their speed is 0 until the end of their next turn.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The knife lands in the target's square, and has 30 Stamina and damage immunity 5. Whenever the knife takes damage, it deals 4 sonic damage to each enemy within 3 squares. The knife lasts until the end of the encounter, and can't be picked up or manipulated.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The basalt stone giant moves up to their speed. Each square that they leave during this move is difficult terrain for enemies. Giants ignore this difficult terrain.

features.name: Resonate Rune
features.trigger: The basalt stone giant takes damage.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The target is pushed up to 3 squares, or if they have A < 3, they are pushed up to 6 squares and knocked prone.
Whenever an enemy obtains a tier 1 outcome on a melee ability used against the basalt stone giant, they take a bane on that ability until the end of the encounter.
The basalt stone giant ignores difficult terrain.
The basalt stone giant can burrow through stone, but can't drag other creatures underground when they do so.

features.name: Roiling Fist
features.target: Each enemy and object in the area

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: Each target makes either an **Agility test** or an **Intuition test**.

features.name: Lava Pillar
features.target: Each enemy and object in the area

features.name: Fuel the Fire
features.trigger: A fire giant ally within distance makes a strike.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The strike has a double edge and deals an extra 10 fire damage.

features.name: Forward!
features.target: Self and each ally in the area

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: Each target shifts up to their speed and can make a free strike. Any enemy who takes damage from a free strike this way and who has A < 4 is burning (save ends). A burning enemy takes 1d6 fire damage at the start of each of their turns.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The chief shifts up to 10 squares. Five fire giant fireballer then arrive in unoccupied spaces within distance.

features.name: All to Cinders
features.target: Self and each fire giant ally in the area

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: Each target unleashes a wave of fire, and each enemy within 2 squares of any target makes an Agility test. An enemy affected by two targets takes a bane on the test, while an enemy affected by three or more targets has a double bane.
Whenever an adjacent enemy grabs the chief or uses a melee ability against them, that enemy takes 9 fire damage, and if they have M < 4 they are weakened (save ends)

features.name: Blazing Leap
features.target: Each enemy and object in the area

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The fireballer can jump up to 4 squares before using this ability.
Whenever an adjacent enemy grabs the fireballer or uses a melee ability against them, that enemy takes 5 fire damage.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The blaze ricochets, targeting one additional target within 4 squares of an original target and taking a bane against that target, or targeting two additional targets within 2 squares of an original target and having a double bane against those targets. The lightbearer makes one power roll against all targets.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The lightbearer can target themself with this ability. Each target takes 1d6 fire damage and teleports in a plume of smoke to swap places with the other target.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The lightbearer emits a beacon of light until the start of their next turn. Each fire giant who has line of effect to the lightbearer has a double edge on abilities.

Any fire giant targeted by the lightbearer's damage-dealing abilities ignores the damage and instead regains Stamina equal to the damage that would have been dealt. If the lightbearer moves a fire giant using an ability, they can choose to ignore stability.
Whenever an adjacent enemy grabs the lightbearer or uses a melee ability against them, that enemy takes 5 fire damage.

effects.tier2: 19 fire damage; push 4; A < 3 burning (save ends)
effects.tier3: 23 fire damage; push 6; A < 4 burning (save ends)

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: A burning creature takes 1d6 fire damage at the start of each of their turns. A burning object takes 1d6 fire damage at the end of each round.

features.name: Caldera
features.target: Each enemy and object in the area

effects.tier1: The distance is a 2 burst; 8 fire damage; M < 2 pull 2
effects.tier2: The distance is a 3 burst; 12 fire damage; M < 3 pull 4
effects.tier3: The distance is a 4 burst; 15 fire damage; M < 4 pull 6

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The outermost squares of the area become a 1-square-tall wall of stone. The rest of the area is on fire until the end of the encounter. A creature who enters the area for the first time in a round or starts their turn there takes 3 fire damage.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The red fist jumps up to 5 squares. Each creature adjacent to them when they land takes 5 fire damage.

features.name: Heat and Pressure
features.trigger: A creature within distance willingly moves or shifts away from the red fist.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The target makes a **Might test**. A target with fire immunity automatically obtains a tier 3 outcome.

features.name: Guardian Block
features.trigger: An ally within distance is targeted by an enemy's ability.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The red fist becomes the target of the triggering ability, then can make a free strike against the enemy after the ability resolves.
Whenever an adjacent enemy grabs the red fist or uses a melee ability against them, that enemy takes 5 fire damage.

features.name: Slushfall
features.target: One creature or object per minion

effects.effect: The snowblaster is surrounded by a snowstorm. Any enemy who starts their turn within 2 squares of the snowblaster can't shift.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: Whenever a creature bleeding this way takes damage from that condition, their speed decreases by 1 (to a minimum of 0) until that condition ends.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The storm hurler throws three size 1L ice javelins into unoccupied squares within distance. Each javelin has 30 Stamina and fire weakness 5. At the start of the storm hurler's next turn, all javelins not destroyed explode in a shower of icicles. Each enemy and object within 3 squares of an exploding javelin makes an **Agility test**.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The storm hurler and the target each shift up to 6 squares while staying adjacent to each other. The target can then jump up to 5 squares and make a free strike.

features.name: Frozen Retribution
features.trigger: The storm hurler is targeted by a ranged strike.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The triggering strike has a double bane. If the strike obtains a tier 1 outcome, the storm hurler uses Ice Javelins against the creature who made it.
The storm hurler is surrounded by a snowstorm. Any enemy who starts their turn within 2 squares of the storm hurler can't shift.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: A target who is already bleeding takes an extra 1d6 cold damage.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The wind sprinter shifts up to their speed and uses Cold Axe against each enemy who comes within 2 squares of them during the move. The wind sprinter makes one power roll against all targets.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The wind sprinter and the target each shift up to 6 squares while staying adjacent to each other. The target can then jump up to 5 squares and make a free strike.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The wind sprinter moves up to their speed and uses Cold Axe against one target.

The wind sprinter can move through enemies' spaces at their usual speed. The first time on a turn that a wind sprinter enters a creature's space, that creature can choose to fall prone or to take 8 damage.
The wind sprinter is surrounded by a snowstorm. Any enemy who starts their turn within 2 squares of the wind sprinter can't shift.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: If the target is already weakened, they are also bleeding (save ends).

features.name: Crag Burst
features.target: Each enemy and object in the area

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The area is difficult terrain. Whenever a creature enters square in the area, they take 3 damage.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The granite stone giant moves up to their speed and creates a 14 wall of stone in squares adjacent to the path of their movement.

features.name: Pillar
features.trigger: A creature or object within distance moves or shifts away from the granite stone giant.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: A 1-square pillar of stone rises 5 squares out of the ground beneath the target, who moves with the ground to its new elevation, then is vertical pushed 5 squares.
Whenever an enemy obtains a tier 1 outcome on a melee ability used against the granite stone giant, they take a bane on that ability until the end of the encounter.
The granite stone giant ignores difficult terrain.
The granite stone giant can burrow through stone, but can't drag other creatures underground when they do so.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: A target who is already prone takes an extra 12 damage.

effects.tier2: 20 damage; prone; M < 3 can't stand (save ends)
effects.tier3: 25 damage; prone; M < 4 can't stand (save ends)

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: In suitably soft ground, the target is entrenched in a 2-square deep hole.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: Each target must make either a **Might test** or an **Agility test**.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The clobberer can choose to fall prone in order to double the forced movement distance.

features.name: You Ain't Getting Away
features.trigger: A creature within distance moves or shifts away from the clobberer.

effects.tier1: Grabbed, and the target takes a bane on the Escape Grab maneuver
effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The target makes an Agility test.
A target who would be grabbed by this ability is instead either vertical pushed up to 5 squares; or they take 5 damage, are knocked prone, and can't stand until the end of their next turn.

The clobberer automatically destroys any mundane size 1 objects in their path when they move or are forced moved. They can break through any mundane wall made of wood, stone, or a similarly sturdy material this way as long as the wall is 2 squares thick or less.

Whenever the clobberer targets a creature or object with an ability, any enemy within distance of the ability can use a free triggered action to distract the clobberer. The clobberer targets that enemy instead.

features.name: Swing
features.target: One creature or object per minion

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The mosstooth can use a creature or object they have grabbed as a weapon for this ability, dealing an extra 5 damage to that creature or object and the target. They then end the grab and leave the creature or object prone in an unoccupied space adjacent to the target.

Whenever the mosstooth targets a creature or object with an ability, any enemy within distance of the ability can use a free triggered action to distract the mosstooth. The mosstooth targets that enemy instead.

features.name: Marble From a Great Sling
features.target: Each enemy and object in the area

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: If the target has any effect on them that can be ended by a saving throw or that ends at the end of their turn, they are also knocked prone.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: Against a target who is prone or grabbed, this ability has a double edge.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The ground in the area becomes slick and glossy. Any non-giant who starts or ends their turn in the area is knocked prone and slides 2 squares.

features.name: Break Armor
features.trigger: The marble stone giant takes damage.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The marble stone giant halves the damage, and has damage weakness 3 and a +3 bonus to speed until the end of the encounter. The damage weakness increases by 3 each time the marble stone giant uses this ability in the same encounter.
Whenever an enemy obtains a tier 1 outcome on a melee ability used against the marble stone giant, they take a bane on that ability until the end of the encounter.
The marble stone giant ignores difficult terrain.
The marble stone giant can burrow through stone, but can't drag other creatures underground when they do so.

features.name: Buried in Sand
features.target: One creature or object per minion

effects.effect: Whenever an enemy obtains a tier 1 outcome on a melee ability used against the sand stone giant, they take a bane on that ability until the end of the encounter.
The sand stone giant ignores difficult terrain.
The sand stone giant can burrow through stone, but can't drag other creatures underground when they do so.
